ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-09-2013 Continued To Aug-06-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Executor Carlton Seike to appear on August 6, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why he has failed to file a response to the Probate Examiner's notes. The accounting petition is also continued to that date.

Judge: John Dearman. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Dec-22-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Carlton Seike in Propria Persona.

The Court advised Mr. Seike of what is required to proceed with administering of the estate. The Court granted the Petition for Probate Will (subject to review of the order). Bond is not required. A compliance status hearing was set for April 25, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy A. Kendall.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Dec-07-2011 Continued To Dec-14-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-12-2011 Continued To Dec-07-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearance: Petitioner Carl Seike present in pro per.

Mr. Seike reported tha he had sent copy of his documents to court.
The Court addressed the 07-08-11 order indicating what needed to be done, issue on proof of service, no declaration or supplemental document in the order and verification, that matter require a re-publication and continued to 12-07-11, Mr. Seike to call the court's examiner if he have any question and to check the tentative line the day before the hearing date.
Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy Whitehead.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Aug-24-2011 Continued To Oct-12-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Carlton Seike in Propria Persona. Jeanette Palmer also present.

The Court returned the documents that were improperly submitted by Ms. Palmer. The matter was continued to October 12, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Mr. Seike to file all of the items explained in the July 8, 2011 Court order. The Court advised Mr. Seike to seek the assistance of an Attorney.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Cabrera.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-08-2011 Continued To Aug-24-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

Mr. Seike and Ms. Palmer were advised by the Clerk that the papers need to be in order, that Mr. Seike needs to appear in Court and that the Court would continue the matter to another date. The Court is awaiting a new date from Mr. Seike. The matter is to be continued.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

July 8, 2011: The Court received no contact from Mr. Seike. An order continuing the hearing date was issued. The matter was continued to August 24, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-10-2011 Continued To Jun-21-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court stated that Carlton Richard Seike is in Propria Persona, that he has an Accountant assisting him, that the Accountant asked the Probate Examiner if she could appear for Mr. Seike and that the Examiner indicated that the Accountant could not appear for him. The Court also stated that Mr. Seike needs an Attorney to assist him with the petition because it has many defects. The Petition for Probate of Will was continued to June 21, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Probate Examiner is to contact Mr. Seike.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
